---
title: "Research"
---

## Coral Reef Ecology & Oceanography

**OCEANICOS — Universidad Nacional de Colombia** · 2025–Present

Study of the relationship between oceanographic processes and the ecology of coral reef
communities, focused on reef systems in **Barú (Colombian Caribbean)**. The work applies the
**CROCO** ocean model to characterize the environmental conditions that shape reef stability.

- Co-authored a poster at **SENALMAR 2026** (National Seminar on Marine Sciences and Technologies).

## Population Genetics

**"Explorers of Genetic Diversity" Research Group** · 2024–Present

Contribution to a project on the **taxonomic identification of a freshwater fish**
(*Hypostomus* sp.), with training in phylogenetic systematics and bioinformatics.

- Co-authored a poster at the **Colombian Congress of Ichthyology 2026**.

## Conference Presentations

1. **Arenas-Ocampo, M.**, Suárez, P. G., Sandoval-Hernández, C., DoNascimento, C., &
   Márquez-Fernández, E. J. (2026). *Simple dentition in* Hypostomus *(Siluriformes: Loricariidae):
   taxonomic challenges and morphological concordance in biological collections of Colombia.*
   Poster, Colombian Congress of Ichthyology 2026.

2. **Arenas-Ocampo, M.**, & Cardona-Orozco, Y. (2026). *Coral communities in Barú: an approach to
   the analysis of environmental stability from oceanographic and geomorphological conditions.*
   Poster, SENALMAR 2026.
